title: Yankees pitcher Cam Schlittler says he’s getting death threats ahead of Fenway Park debut

title: Red Sox’ offense flails against Tigers ace Tarik Skubal, fall 4-1

title: After his career was declared ‘dead in the water’, Jordan Walsh gets a playoff opportunity for revival
